results.rendered_html:
dhama (von dham)  P. 3,1,137 .
1〉 adj. am Ende eines comp. blasend, blasend in, schmelzend; f. karaṃ˚, khariṃ˚, khāri˚, ghaṭiṃ˚, jalaṃ˚.
— 2〉 m.
a〉 der Mond.
— b〉 Bein. Kṛṣṇaʼs.
— c〉 Bein. Yamaʼs.
— d〉 Bein. [Page3-0867] Brahmanʼs  ŚABDAC. _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
dhama a. (mā or mī f.) [dham dhmāne ac] (Usually at the end of a comp.)
1 Blowing; agniṃdhama, nāḍiṃdhama.
2 Melting, fusing.
— maḥ
1 The moon.
2 An epithet of Kṛṣṇa.
3 Of Yama, the god of death.
4 Of Brahmā.
